testcase.name: Store response from the API and write a json/xml file

failure.message: WriteToTemplates.feature:11 - evaluation (js) failed: baseURL, javax.script.ScriptException: ReferenceError: "baseURL" is not defined in <eval> at line number 1 stack trace: jdk.nashorn.api.scripting.NashornScriptEngine.throwAsScriptException(NashornScriptEngine.java:470)

testcase.failure:
* def writePath = '../src/test/java/ProcessedTemplates/' .................. passed * def javaUtils = Java.type('ReusableUtils.JavaUtils') .................... passed * def javaUtlObj = new javaUtils .......................................... passed Given url baseURL ......................................................... failed
Stack Trace: com.intuit.karate.exception.KarateException: WriteToTemplates.feature:11 - evaluation (js) failed: baseURL, javax.script.ScriptException: ReferenceError: "baseURL" is not defined in <eval> at line number 1 stack trace: jdk.nashorn.api.scripting.NashornScriptEngine.throwAsScriptException(NashornScriptEngine.java:470) at ✽.Given url baseURL (WriteToTemplates.feature:11)
And path apiPath .......................................................... skipped When method get ........................................................... skipped Then status 200 ........................................................... skipped * def respBlock = karate.jsonPath(response, "$..data[?(@."+'first_name'+" == '"+'Janet'+"')]") . skipped * print "respBlock: ", respBlock.id ....................................... skipped * def respId = karate.jsonPath(respBlock, "$..id")[0] ..................... skipped * def respAvatar = karate.jsonPath(respBlock, "$..avatar")[0] ............. skipped * def respFName = karate.jsonPath(respBlock, "$..first_name")[0] .......... skipped * def respLName = karate.jsonPath(respBlock, "$..last_name")[0] ........... skipped * def respEmail = karate.jsonPath(respBlock, "$..email")[0] ............... skipped * xml xmlPayload = read('classPath:XMLTemplates/SampleXML_Template.xml') .. skipped * def jsonPayload = read('classPath:XMLTemplates/SampleJson.json') ........ skipped * def xmlFileName = javaUtlObj.currentDateTimeFileName() + '.xml' ......... skipped * def jsonFileName = javaUtlObj.currentDateByFormat('yyyyMMddHHMMSS') + '.json' . skipped * print karate.prettyXml(xmlPayload) ...................................... skipped * karate.write(karate.prettyXml(xmlPayload), writePath + xmlFileName) ..... skipped * karate.write(jsonPayload, writePath + jsonFileName) ..................... skipped

And path apiPath .......................................................... skipped When method get ........................................................... skipped Then status 200 ........................................................... skipped * def respBlock = karate.jsonPath(response, "$..data[?(@."+'email'+" == '"+'janet.weaver@reqres.in'+"')]") . skipped * print "respBlock: ", respBlock.id ....................................... skipped * def respId = karate.jsonPath(respBlock, "$..id")[0] ..................... skipped * def respAvatar = karate.jsonPath(respBlock, "$..avatar")[0] ............. skipped * def respFName = karate.jsonPath(respBlock, "$..first_name")[0] .......... skipped * def respLName = karate.jsonPath(respBlock, "$..last_name")[0] ........... skipped * def respEmail = karate.jsonPath(respBlock, "$..email")[0] ............... skipped * xml xmlPayload = read('classPath:XMLTemplates/SampleXML_Template.xml') .. skipped * def jsonPayload = read('classPath:XMLTemplates/SampleJson.json') ........ skipped * def xmlFileName = javaUtlObj.currentDateTimeFileName() + '.xml' ......... skipped * def jsonFileName = javaUtlObj.currentDateByFormat('yyyyMMddHHMMSS') + '.json' . skipped * print karate.prettyXml(xmlPayload) ...................................... skipped * karate.write(karate.prettyXml(xmlPayload), writePath + xmlFileName) ..... skipped * karate.write(jsonPayload, writePath + jsonFileName) ..................... skipped
